key.name: close-window
key.summary: Close the active window

key.name: focus-column-left
key.summary: Focus the column to the left

key.name: focus-window-down
key.summary: Focus the window below

key.name: focus-window-up
key.summary: Focus the window above

key.name: focus-column-right
key.summary: Focus the column to the right

key.name: focus-column-first
key.summary: Focus the first column

key.name: focus-column-last
key.summary: Focus the last column

key.name: move-column-left
key.summary: Move the focused column left

key.name: move-window-down
key.summary: Move the focused window down

key.name: move-window-up
key.summary: Move the focused window up

key.name: move-column-right
key.summary: Move the focused column right

key.name: expel-window-right
key.summary: Expel the focused window into its own column to the right

key.name: consume-window-into-column
key.summary: Consume the window on the right into the focused column

key.name: expel-window-from-column
key.summary: Expel the bottom window into its own column to the right

key.name: center-column
key.summary: Center the focused column or floating window

key.name: maximize-column-toggle
key.summary: Maximize/unmaximize the focused column

key.name: fullscreen-window-toggle
key.summary: Toggle fullscreen for the focused window

key.name: inc-column-width
key.summary: Increment the focused column width

key.name: dec-column-width
key.summary: Decrement the focused column width

key.name: inc-window-height
key.summary: Increment the focused window height

key.name: dec-window-height
key.summary: Decrement the focused window height

key.name: cycle-preset-column-width
key.summary: Cycle through useful column widths

key.name: cycle-preset-column-width-backwards
key.summary: Cycle through useful column widths backwards

key.name: cycle-preset-window-height
key.summary: Cycle through useful window heights

key.name: cycle-preset-window-height-backwards
key.summary: Cycle through useful window heights backwards

key.name: focus-window-down-or-column-right
key.summary: Focus the window below, or the column to the right

key.name: focus-window-up-or-column-left
key.summary: Focus the window above, or the column to the left

key.name: cycle-focus-modes
key.summary: Cycle between window focus modes (default, center, edge)

key.name: focus-monitor-left
key.summary: Focus the monitor to the left

key.name: focus-monitor-below
key.summary: Focus the monitor below

key.name: focus-monitor-above
key.summary: Focus the monitor above

key.name: focus-monitor-right
key.summary: Focus the monitor to the right

key.name: toggle-window-floating
key.summary: Float/unfloat the focused window

key.name: switch-focus-between-floating-and-tiling
key.summary: Switch focus between the floating and tiling layers

key.name: restore-attach-modal-dialogs
key.summary: Original setting value (used for restore)

key.name: restore-workspaces-only-on-primary
key.summary: Original setting value (used for restore)

key.name: restore-edge-tiling
key.summary: Original setting value (used for restore)

key.name: horizontal-margin
key.summary: Minimum margin from windows left and right edge

key.name: vertical-margin
key.summary: Minimum margin to the top and bottom monitor edge

key.name: column-gap
key.summary: Minimum gap between columns

key.name: minimap-scale
key.summary: Scale of mini mini-map tiles compared to their actual window size.

key.name: minimap-shade-opacity
key.summary: Sets the opacity of the non-selected windows during minimap navigation.

key.name: edge-preview-enable
key.summary: Enables tiling edge window previews

key.name: edge-preview-scale
key.summary: Scale of window previews at tiling edge. Scale is percent of actual window size.

key.name: edge-preview-click-enable
key.summary: Enables activating edge preview with click

key.name: edge-preview-timeout-enable
key.summary: Enables activating edge preview with a timeout

key.name: edge-preview-timeout
key.summary: Timeout (ms) before activating the edge preview

key.name: edge-preview-timeout-continual
key.summary: Enables the continual activation of windows if pointer is at edge of monitor

key.name: window-switcher-preview-scale
key.summary: Scale of window switch previews. Scale is percent of actual window size

key.name: warp-pointer-on-focus
key.summary: Warp pointer onto window on focus change

key.name: swipe-sensitivity
key.summary: Swipe sensitivity in [x, y] coordinates

key.name: swipe-friction
key.summary: Swipe friction in [x, y] coordinates

key.name: preset-column-widths
key.summary: cycle-preset-column-width cycles through these widths. value < 1 is interpreted as a ratio of the monitor width. Mixed ratios and pixel values not allowed.

key.name: preset-window-heights
key.summary: cycle-preset-window-height cycles through these heights. value < 1 is interpreted as a ratio of the monitor height. Mixed ratios and pixel values not allowed.

key.name: maximize-column-width
key.summary: Percent of workspace width used by a maximized column

key.name: default-show-top-bar
key.summary: Show the top bar on workspaces by default

key.name: default-focus-mode
key.summary: Set the default focus mode. 0:DEFAULT 1:CENTER 2:EDGE

key.name: show-focus-mode-icon
key.summary: Show the focus mode icon in the topbar

key.name: topbar-mouse-scroll-enable
key.summary: Enables mouse scrolling on topbar to switch window (left/right)

key.name: animation-time
key.summary: Duration of animations in seconds

key.name: drag-drift-speed
key.summary: Drift speed (px/ms) when mouse is at edge of monitor when dragging windows

key.name: overview-max-window-scale
key.summary: Sets the maximum window scale (compared to actual window size) of Gnome overview windows

key.name: overview-min-windows-per-row
key.summary: Sets the minimum number or windows per row before adding a new window row

key.name: overview-ensure-viewport-animation
key.summary: Sets the animation when exiting GNOME overview and ensuring selected window is in view. 0:NONE, 1:TRANSLATE, 2:FADE

key.name: winprops
key.summary: Array of winprops as (JSON) string objects

key.name: gesture-enabled
key.summary: Enables AlbumWM touchpad gestures

key.name: gesture-horizontal-fingers
key.summary: Number of fingers for tiling horizontal swipe. 0:DISABLED 3:THREE_FINGERS 4:FOUR_FINGERS
